description: Promotional posts announcing retail events or sales at physical locations with giveaways, prizes, and festive atmosphere to drive foot traffic and engagement.
structural_recipe: Feature event details including: (1) festive opening statement with emoji, (2) specific prize offerings and brand partnerships, (3) multiple location callouts with clear mall/venue names and cities, (4) urgency messaging ('don't miss'), (5) celebration-themed hashtags, (6) visual hierarchy emphasizing location and dates, (7) call-to-action encouraging attendance
why_it_works: Saudi consumers respond strongly to limited-time offers, branded partnerships, and multi-location retail events that create FOMO. Holiday/celebration positioning (عيد/Eid context) aligns with cultural celebration moments. Named locations build trust and reduce friction to attendance. Prize/giveaway mechanics drive sharing and community participation.
transplantation_caveats: Event dates must align with Saudi cultural calendars (Eid, Saudi National Day, etc.) for maximum relevance
Location specificity is critical—generic multi-city posts underperform; ensure venues are accurate and accessible
Prize eligibility and rules must comply with Saudi regulations around giveaways
Arabic-language dominance expected; English-only versions show lower engagement in F&B sector
cultural_constraints: Event messaging should reference cultural celebrations or family-oriented occasions
Avoid alcohol or non-Halal food references in promotional copy
Timing around prayer hours may affect event scheduling perception
